query:
SELECT DATE(createdAt) as data, COUNT(*) as totale, SUM(isResearchOfDay) as research_del_giorno
FROM research_reports
WHERE DATE(createdAt) >= '2026-03-27'
GROUP BY DATE(createdAt)
ORDER BY data DESC;
